title: Bhagavad Gita 12.13-20: The Beloved Devotee
description: Krishna describes who is dearest to him: free from hatred, compassionate, without ego, equal in pleasure and pain.
introduction: Krishna describes who is dearest to him: free from hatred, compassionate, without ego, equal in pleasure and pain.

translation.text: One who has no hatred toward any being, who is friendly and compassionate, free from possessiveness and ego — such a one is dear to me.
